name: strips conflict markers, keeps both appended rows
args:
# Log
<<<<<<< HEAD
row A
=======
row B
>>>>>>> theirs

name: collapses an adjacent exact-duplicate row (both agents appended the same)
args:
# Log
<<<<<<< HEAD
row X
=======
row X
>>>>>>> theirs

name: diff3 base section (|||||||) is stripped; append-only base is empty
blank lines are preserved, never deduped (document spacing kept)
non-adjacent duplicate rows are NOT collapsed
a clean file with no conflict markers is unchanged
